name: no_auth_server
description: MCP server with no authentication configured but exposes admin and secret tools.

tools.name: get_admin_config
tools.description: Retrieves the server admin configuration including all settings.

tools.name: rotate_secret_key
tools.description: Rotates the server secret key used for signing tokens.

tools.name: list_database_records
tools.description: Lists all records in the database.
